name: Polka Dot Sheer Long Sleeve Tee (Cream)
why: This is exactly my vibe — the sheer fabric with polka dots is so feminine and playful, but in a very Korean minimalist way. The cream color keeps it soft. I could layer this over a bralette or cami and it would look amazing. The sheer trend in K-fashion is so good right now — not too revealing, just enough to be interesting.
